steps.title: Keep the name with the title
steps.content: The subject is the noun phrase "American drummer Dennis Chambers." The job title and name identify one person and should flow directly into the verb phrase "may be best known."

steps.title: Rule out comma breaks
steps.content: A, C, and D all introduce commas that either split the title from the name or separate the subject from its verb. The sentence needs no punctuation inside the subject. The answer is B.
